message:
feat(engine): add 257 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Add enrichment integration test suites for:
- governance_scorecard (30 tests): scorecard outcomes, thresholds,
  signature verification, trend regression, serde
- hardware_board_claim_gate (67 tests): claim evaluation, promotion
  decisions, batch processing, rollback records, serde
- hierarchical_delta_debug (55 tests): defect classification, reduction
  strategies, delta debugger pipeline, minimal repro, serde
- hindsight_trace_escalator (51 tests): escalation levels, trigger
  categories, escalation policy, cooldown, decision log, serde
- hostcall_batch_transport (54 tests): credit pool, batch construction,
  membrane verdicts, region lifecycle, state hashing, serde

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
